items.headline: Albemarle: A Different Storage Boom
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation is regaining momentum as lithium prices rebound, driven by surging energy storage systems (ESS). Q1 2026 results: EPS $2.95, adjusted EBITDA $664M. ESS demand growing at 117% YTD pace.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Wins Analyst Upgrades As Lithium Expansion Story Gains Support
items.snippet: Analyst support centered on expansion and productivity. Citi and RBC highlighting expansion and productivity improvements.

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: ESS demand projected to balance with EV demand within two years. Rio Tinto plans lithium capacity increase.

items.headline: Citi upgrades Albemarle to Buy
items.snippet: Citi raised ALB from High Risk to Buy. Target $225. Market underestimating growth potential.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8B and $2.9B. Reiterated Outperform, boosted PT to $257.
